substep.title: Read Locked Design
substep.action:
Read {{design_path}} completely. Extract: - "## Current state" (for context) - "## Desired end state" (target structure to compose) - "## Design decisions" → "### Vertical slices" list - "## Design decisions" → "### Multi-plan identification"
If design.md status != "accepted", halt with: "code-design has not been completed (status={{actual_status}}). Run code-design first; structure consumes a locked design."
Set {{plan_count}} from multi-plan identification. Set {{slices}} = list of slice descriptions.

substep.title: Create Structure File
substep.action:
Compose {{structure_path}} = {{bundle_dir}}/structure-{{date}}-{{ticket_slug}}.md.
Create with frontmatter: kind: structure status: active parent: [[{{ticket_alias}}]] depends_on: [[{{design_alias}}]] aliases: [structure-{{date}}-{{ticket_slug}}] (plus standard thoughts-metadata fields)
Initial body: # Structure
**Parent**: [[{{ticket_alias}}]] **Design**: [[{{design_alias}}]] **Plans**: {{plan_count}}
_Structural skeleton produced by S-phase. Locks files + signatures + test structure. Tactics (TDD step sequencing) are P-phase's job._
(per-plan sections appended in step 2)
